revision.text: {| class="navbox collapsible collapsed" style="text-align: left; border: 0px; margin-top: 0.2em;" |- ! style="background-color: #ffd8a0;" | {{{1 | Extended Discussion}}} |- | style="text-align:center;" | ''The following is an archived debate of the possible [[Wikipedia:Conflict of interest|conflict of interest]] related to the article above. '''Please do not modify it.''''' |- | style="border: solid 1px silver; padding: 8px; background-color: white;" |{{coib}} To be used for placing collapse boxes around discussions as follows: '''====[[[[Header]]]]====''' → Replace with '''{{subst:dat|[[[[Header]]]]|''' DISCUSSION ← Body of the discussion stays unchanged → Close the box with '''{{subst:dab}}''' *This template and {{tl|dab}}) need to be substed for the time stamp to work properly. *See also: [[Template:DAB]] [[Category:Archival templates|DAT]]
